title: Decision-Making Under Uncertainty
promise: Decision-quality assessment for probability, evidence, reversibility, speed, bias control, and learning.
audience: Founders, executives, product leaders, investors, and innovation teams
description: Scenario-based maturity assessment across Probabilistic Thinking, Evidence Quality, Reversibility & Speed, Bias Control & Learning. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action.
ogDescription: Decision-quality assessment for probability, evidence, reversibility, speed, bias control, and learning.
